matching_rule: One base case matches when a promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample. Three additional case families match when the whitelist mean beta, the gene-name-related mean beta, or the all-numeric mean beta resolves to low, medium, or high methylation. Variant prediction rules receive the decoded sample GT, zygosity, ALT dosage, and site REF -> ALT definition; curated allele rules take precedence only when the sample genotype carries the relevant allele dosage.
disclaimer: Predictive theses in this database are literature-guided research summaries derived from the bundled gene interpretation bundle. They are designed for exploratory synthesis in the UI and should not be treated as diagnostic or therapeutic claims.
seeded_markers: MYH7 p.Arg403Gln / R403Q (MYH7 hypertrophic cardiomyopathy marker)
MYH7 sarcomere motor-function model (MYH7 sarcomere motor-function model)
concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a MYH7 sarcomere-motor thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to beta-myosin force generation, cardiomyocyte contraction, hypertrophic or dilated cardiomyopathy review, or muscle ATPase biology. Clinical meaning requires variant classification and phenotype match.

variant_prediction_rules.prediction: GT-confirmed MYH7 p.Arg403Gln / R403Q dosage suggests this sample carries the MYH7 prediction context described by the gene-level thesis. The variant observed in this sample suggests a MYH7 sarcomere-motor thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to beta-myosin force generation, cardiomyocyte contraction, hypertrophic or dilated cardiomyopathy review, or muscle ATPase biology. Clinical meaning requires variant classification and phenotype match. This specific marker is curated as MYH7 hypertrophic cardiomyopathy marker. MYH7 p.Arg403Gln / R403Q is curated as a MYH7 marker for Hypertrophic and dilated cardiomyopathy review context, Sarcomere force generation and ATPase motor biology. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the beta-myosin heavy-chain motor activity, sarcomere contraction, ATPase force generation, and cardiomyopathy biology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_prediction_rules.sample_change_template: This sample matched MYH7 p.Arg403Gln / R403Q at site definition {change} with GT {gt_raw} decoded as {genotype} ({zygosity}). Anchor the MYH7 prediction to genotype dosage {allele_dosage} rather than REF -> ALT presence alone. Dosage-specific conclusions should be softened when GT, depth, balance, or genotype quality are uncertain.
variant_prediction_rules.basis: Can modify or tag beta-myosin heavy-chain motor activity, sarcomere contraction, ATPase force generation, and cardiomyopathy biology.

methylation_sources.label: Whitelist mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses the curated whitelist probes stored in the interpretation database for the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: Gene-name-related mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses rows whose gene annotation explicitly names the current gene.

cases.label: Gene variant found
cases.prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a MYH7 sarcomere-motor thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to beta-myosin force generation, cardiomyocyte contraction, hypertrophic or dilated cardiomyopathy review, or muscle ATPase biology. Clinical meaning requires variant classification and phenotype match. An observed MYH7 variant places this sample in the curated MYH7 research context. The local MYH7 bundle is sarcomere and cardiomyopathy oriented. High-impact MYH7 variants require cardiac phenotype, family history, inheritance, and expert variant classification. MYH7 missense variants can alter myosin motor function and are important in hypertrophic, dilated, or other cardiomyopathy contexts.
cases.rationale: This is the base thesis that activates as soon as any promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample.

cases.label: Gene variant found + high whitelist mean beta
cases.prediction: When a MYH7 variant is paired with high methylation in the whitelist mean beta, the sample best fits a combined regulatory-context thesis. This pattern leans toward stronger regulatory restraint or reduced local accessibility around the locus. The variant side of the thesis is: The variant observed in this sample suggests a MYH7 sarcomere-motor thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to beta-myosin force generation, cardiomyocyte contraction, hypertrophic or dilated cardiomyopathy review, or muscle ATPase biology. Clinical meaning requires variant classification and phenotype match. MYH7 methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a beta-myosin heavy-chain motor activity, sarcomere contraction, ATPase force generation, and cardiomyopathy biology gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data. The local MYH7 bundle is sarcomere and cardiomyopathy oriented. High-impact MYH7 variants require cardiac phenotype, family history, inheritance, and expert variant classification. MYH7 missense variants can alter myosin motor function and are important in hypertrophic, dilated, or other cardiomyopathy contexts.
